steps.title: Set up variables for total costs
steps.content:
Let $x$ = total cost of square tables and $y$ = total cost of hexagonal tables.

From the problem:
  • Total cost: $x + y = 25,740$
  • Revenues are $2x$ (square) and $2.5y$ (hexagonal), so total revenue: $2x + 2.5y = 61,875$

steps.title: Calculate the revenue difference
steps.content:
Revenue from hexagonal tables: $2.5y = 2.5(20,790) = 51,975$

Revenue from square tables: $2x = 2(4,950) = 9,900$

Revenue difference: $51,975 - 9,900 = 42,075$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
